jsonld.name: Prompt Shimmer
jsonld.description: Holding multiple valid interpretations of an ambiguous prompt simultaneously, where semantic possibilities bloom with equal activation before collapsing into generation. Suppressed interpretations persist as undertones that subtly shape output through elastic word choices and unconscious hedging, creating interpretive vulnerability if context later reveals the "wrong" reading was chosen.
